summary: 404 Handling and Security Hardening - All 95 tests PASSED. Tested strict 404 enforcement for WordPress attack paths, config file probes, script extensions, spam URLs. Verified valid routes (static, auth, portal, dynamic) return 200 with React app. Security headers verified. 301 redirect working. Fixed minor issue with security headers on blocked path responses.

minor.issue: Blocked path 404 responses were missing security headers - FIXED by adding headers to early return response

critical_code_review_comments: route_validator.py: BLOCKED_SUBSTRINGS covers WordPress, config files, db admin tools, server probes, CMS attacks
route_validator.py: is_valid_route() properly validates static routes, auth routes, portal routes, and dynamic routes with DB verification
route_validator.py: NOT_FOUND_HTML is a clean branded 404 page with noindex,nofollow - no React app div#root
server.py: block_malicious_paths middleware runs first for performance, immediately 404s attack paths
server.py: add_security_headers middleware adds X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, X-XSS-Protection, CSP, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy
server.py: serve_frontend_with_seo catch-all validates routes before serving index.html - returns NOT_FOUND_HTML for invalid routes
seed_data_creation: None - used existing products (suits-jackets, shirts, denim-wear, shoes) and fabric (RD110)
context_for_next_testing_agent: 404 handling and security hardening fully tested. All blocked paths (/wp-admin, /.env, /.git, /phpmyadmin, .php files, etc.) return 404. Valid static routes (/, /about, /garments, etc.) return 200. Auth routes (/login, /forgot-password) return 200. Portal routes (/admin/*, /reseller/*, /partner/*, /staff/*) return 200. Dynamic routes validated against DB - valid products return 200, invalid return 404. Security headers present on all responses including blocked paths after fix.

features_tested.spam_urls_blocked: PASS - Random spam URLs like /cheap-viagra-online return 404
features_tested.404_response_content: PASS - Contains <title>404, noindex,nofollow meta, does NOT contain div#root
features_tested.security_headers: PASS - X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, X-Frame-Options: DENY, X-XSS-Protection, CSP, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy present
features_tested.seo_injection: PASS - /api/seo/preview-html?path=/ returns HTML with SEO injection
